key_risks: Semiconductor and Nasdaq momentum reverses after extended run, dragging the high-beta sleeve
Hawkish FOMC dots and sticky 4.2% CPI lift yields, pressuring growth multiples
Holiday-shortened liquidity amplifies an adverse intraday move into the June 25 exit close

portfolio.rationale: Broad large-cap core with strong momentum into the window; balanced risk-on exposure.
Strongest tech momentum (+8.3% 7d) on durable AI demand; leadership likely to continue near-term.
Mega-cap growth leadership with Nasdaq up 1.9% on entry day; continuation tilt.
Cash-like ballast given sticky inflation (CPI 4.2%, hawkish dots) and short holiday-shortened week.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt to continuation in US large-cap and semiconductor leadership where momentum is strongest, with short-duration Treasuries as ballast against rate/inflation risk during a holiday-shortened week.
rationale_summary: Risk-on continuation in dominant US tech/large-cap leadership, partially hedged with cash-like BIL.
